entry.title: IDC N6274217D3600 (P00008) awarded to KBR DIEGO GARCIA, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: N62742-17-D-3600 MODIFICATION P00008, DIEGO GARCIA BASE OPERATIONS SUPPORT (BOS) SERVICES. THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE AWARD FEE PLAN REVISION 3.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
